tools.Name: LightRAG
tools.Description: A simple and fast framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that uses graph-based retrieval to outperform traditional naive RAG systems.
tools.Use_Case: Improving query results and comprehensiveness in RAG applications by leveraging knowledge graphs.

tools.Name: mlx-lm
tools.Description: A Python package designed for efficient text generation and fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) specifically for Apple silicon using MLX.
tools.Use_Case: Running, fine-tuning, and quantizing LLMs locally on macOS devices with high performance.

tools.Name: mngr
tools.Description: A Unix-style CLI tool for creating, managing, and orchestrating multiple AI agents across local hosts, containers, and cloud environments.
tools.Use_Case: Scaling and managing coding agents in parallel, simplifying the developer workflow for agentic tasks.
